properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Blooshi is not unlocked with this skin. Blooshi can only be unlocked by completing Bully for You! - the second Variant of The Fairy Rings of Thither adventure in the Wild Beyond the Witchlight Campaign.

backstory.original: Blooshi isn't like other bullywugs-she's dark. Nobody understands this teen, but when she picked up a strange skull, she found someone who does: an undead entity who sealed her in a warlock pact. Now whenever she dies she comes back as a much tougher ghost, smashing her assailants before being sucked back into her body and returning to life. Very useful and goes with her whole, like, vibe. Surely there will be no repercussions!
backstory.display: 布鲁西和别的狂蛙人都不一样--她可黑暗着呢。没人能理解这位少女，但当她执起那颗古怪的头骨时，她找到了一位知心人：一个亡灵与她签订了邪术师契约。现在，无论在何处死去，她都会以更强大的鬼魂形态复归世间并痛扁敌手，直到再次被吸入她的躯壳中然后起死回生。这能力很实用，而且也很合她的，呃，风格。当然，这不会有任何不良副作用！

description.original: Blooshi attacks with an Eldritch Blast dealing damage and taunting it, if possible.
description.display: 布鲁西用魔能爆弹攻击，造成伤害并对未被嘲讽的敌人施加嘲讽。

longDescription.original: Blooshi attacks the closest untaunted enemy with an Eldritch Blast dealing damage and taunting it. If all enemies are currently taunted, she attacks a random enemy instead.
longDescription.display: 布鲁西用魔能爆弹攻击最近的未被嘲讽敌人，对其造成伤害并施放嘲讽。如果所有敌人当前均已受到嘲讽，她会改为攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Bullywug spirits toss each enemy back, dealing damage to each of them.
description.display: 狂蛙人之灵击退敌人，对他们造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Bullywug spirits fly in picking up each enemy and tossing them back 25% of the screen, dealing damage to each of them.
longDescription.display: 狂蛙人之灵飞入战场，卷起所有敌人并将他们击退四分之一屏幕的距离，同时对其造成伤害。

description.desc: Whenever an enemy dies, $(source_hero) gains $(default_stacks) Soul Stack. (Boss enemies instead give her $(boss_stacks) Soul Stacks.) $(source_hero) increases the damage of Champions in the two columns behind her by $(amount)% for each Soul stack, stacking additively. When changing areas, she loses 20% of her Soul stacks.
每当一个敌人死去时，$(source_hero)获得 $(default_stacks) 层灵魂。（首领敌人会给予 $(boss_stacks) 层灵魂。）每层灵魂能让$(source_hero)为身后两列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害，以加算方式叠加。在进入新区域时，她将失去 20% 现有的灵魂层数。

tipText.original: Blooshi gains Soul stacks for each enemy killed, buffing the champions in the two columns behind her.
tipText.display: 布鲁西可以从击败的每位敌人身上获得“灵魂”堆叠层数，为身后两列的勇士提供增益。

description.desc: When $(source_hero) dies, she is replaced in the formation with her Spirit. The Spirit continues to attack and can be attacked like normal. While in Spirit form, her health is increased by $(blooshi_spirit_carries_on_bonus_health) and her overwhelm is increased by $(amount___3). Each time you defeat a boss enemy, her "next of kin" returns to the formation.
当$(source_hero)死去时，她会将自己的魂灵留在阵型中。魂灵会继续攻击敌人，也会正常受到攻击。在魂灵形态下，她的生命值会提高 $(blooshi_spirit_carries_on_bonus_health)，击溃值会提高 $(amount___3)。每当你击败一个首领敌人时，她的“继承者”会回到阵型之中。

tipText.original: Blooshi's powerful Spirit tanks for the formation when she dies, until the next boss is defeated
tipText.display: 当布鲁西死亡时，她的强大魂灵会替代她为阵型充当坦克，直到击败下一个首领

description.desc: While $(source_hero) is in Spirit form, Soul Gatherer's damage boost gets a $(not_buffed amount___2)% increase, stacking multiplicatively, for each boss level that $(source_hero) had made it through alive during this adventure.
当$(source_hero)处于魂灵形态时，$(source_hero)在此次冒险中每通过一次首领战斗并存活，灵魂收集者的伤害加成即提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式叠加。

effect_keys.stack_title: 存活时击败的首领数量
存活时击败的首领数量

description.desc: Enemies killed with melee attacks generate twice the number of Soul Stacks for Soul Gatherer.
以近战攻击击杀的敌人，会为灵魂收集者产生两倍灵魂层数。

specializationDescription.original: Blooshi focuses on enemies killed in melee
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁西专注于在近战中击杀敌人

description.desc: Enemies killed with ranged attacks generate twice the number of Soul Stacks for Soul Gatherer.
以远程攻击击杀的敌人，会为灵魂收集者产生两倍灵魂层数。

specializationDescription.original: Blooshi focuses on enemies killed at range
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁西专注于在远距离击杀敌人

description.desc: Enemies killed with magic attacks generate twice the number of Soul Stacks for Soul Gatherer.
以法术攻击击杀的敌人，会为灵魂收集者产生两倍灵魂层数。

specializationDescription.original: Blooshi focuses on enemies killed by magic
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁西专注于使用法术击杀敌人

description.desc: While $(source_hero) is in Spirit form enemy attacks against her increase her current Soul Stacks by $(blooshi_grave_base)% and boss attacks increases her current Soul Stacks by $(blooshi_grave_boss)%, and her base Soul Stack cap is increased to 100,000.
当$(source_hero)处于魂灵形态时，敌人对她的攻击会让她现有的灵魂层数增加 $(blooshi_grave_base)%，首领对她的攻击会让她现有的灵魂层数增加 $(blooshi_grave_boss)%，她的基础灵魂层数上限会提高到 100000 层。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_add_flat_amount,130,7519","description":"Increase the health bonus provided by Spirit Carries On by $amount"}

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the health of all other Champions by $(percent)% of her max spirit health.
$(source_hero)增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于她魂灵形态最大生命值的 $(percent)%。
Blooshi's Spirit form takes $(amount___2)% less damage.
布鲁西在魂灵形态下承受的伤害降低 $(amount___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Blooshi focuses on being a tanking spirit
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁西专注于成为坦克型魂灵

description.desc: Soul Stacks granted by A Grave Situation are increased by $(amount)%.
由墓里阳秋产生的灵魂层数提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Blooshi focuses on being a supportive Spirit
specializationDescription.display: 布鲁西专注于成为辅助型魂灵

description.original: It's not really a big deal if I die. Watch this!
description.display: 我挂了真不算啥大事。看这个！

description.original: Sometimes you just have to say yes, even if it's a weird skull asking.
description.display: 有时候除了同意没别的办法，就算是个怪骷髅头的请求也得答应。

description.original: I'm just, like, more comfortable with death.
description.display: 我啊，怎么说呢，感觉死了就和回家了似的。

description.original: Oh now you're going to catch it!
description.display: 哦，现在你们得好好兜着了！
惊喜上门！我居然更强了！

effects.description: Increase the health bonus provided by Spirit Carries On by $amount%

description.original: You're even easier to drain when I'm dead! Hahaha!
description.display: 我死了之后，你们反而更容易被我抽干了！哈哈哈！

description.original: Hey! Skull guy! Look how good I'm doing!

effects.description: Increase the max stacks of Soul Gatherer by $amount%

description.original: You and me -- and ghost me, and ghost me, and ghost me!
description.display: 你和我--和忽然消失的人，还有忽然消失的人，以及忽然消失的人！

description.original: What's the worst that could happen? I'll just come back!
description.display: 可能发生的最坏情况是什么？我会回来的！

description.original: Follow me! And if need be follow the next me too!
description.display: 跟我来！如果有必要，跟好下一个我！

description.original: It's actually way more, I think. I just stopped counting.
description.display: 我觉得实际上要多得多。我只是不再数了。

description.original: I'm back home! And I'm, like, WAY more powerful now! Check this out!
description.display: 我回到家了！而且我现在厉害多了！你们瞧！

effects.description: Blooshi may be used in any The Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Blooshi isn't like other bullywugs-she's dark. Nobody understands this teen, but when she picked up a strange skull, she found someone who does: an undead entity who sealed her in a warlock pact. Now whenever she dies she comes back as a much tougher ghost, smashing her assailants before being sucked back into her body and returning to life. Very useful and goes with her whole, like, vibe. Surely there will be no repercussions!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Blooshi is a magic using tanking champion, whose Spirit form buffs her abilities

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Blooshi is not unlocked with this skin. Blooshi can only be unlocked by completing Bully for You! - the second Variant of The Fairy Rings of Thither adventure in the Wild Beyond the Witchlight Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 布鲁西和别的狂蛙人都不一样--她可黑暗着呢。没人能理解这位少女，但当她执起那颗古怪的头骨时，她找到了一位知心人：一个亡灵与她签订了邪术师契约。现在，无论在何处死去，她都会以更强大的鬼魂形态复归世间并痛扁敌手，直到再次被吸入她的躯壳中然后起死回生。这能力很实用，而且也很合她的，呃，风格。当然，这不会有任何不良副作用！
character_sheet_details.system_description: 布鲁西是一位使用法术的坦克勇士，她的魂灵形态可以为她的技能提供增益

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士布鲁西不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“欺负的就是你！”——“女巫之光的荒野之旅”战役中“彼方的蘑菇圈”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁布鲁西。

effects.description: 当启用了赞助者时，布鲁西可在任何女巫之光的荒野之旅冒险或支线任务中使用，即便赞助者或支线任务的限制条件在通常情况下会限制她参加，她也可以参加。
